items.title: Robyn Carr's Virgin River
items.long_description:
Enter a quiet mountain town where things are a lot more complicated than they seem on the surface with this 21-ebook bundle of Robyn Carr’s bestselling Virgin River—the series that inspired the hit Netflix show! Meet a recently widowed nurse as she attempts to fit in with the residents of the remote California town while also caring for an abandoned infant in the very first novel Virgin River. Follow along as a former Marine saves a woman on the run with her young child in Shelter Mountain. Root for the town’s first resident cop as he attempts to settle down with the gal who’s stolen his heart in Whispering Rock. Imagine yourself cozied up by the fire inside the mountain cabin of your dreams with a hot chocolate in one hand and this ebook bundle in the other. Pay what you want for the entire series, and support Room to Read with your purchase!

The titles in this bundle are available through Kobo.com. To access the content, create or log in to your Kobo.com account.

items.title: Unreal Environment Bundle
items.long_description: Craft beautiful vistas in a fraction of the time it normally takes your team with the all-new Unreal Environment Bundle. Set the scene for epic boss battles, cozy sims, and more with crisp, easy-to-use preset Environmental Packs like Coast & Dunes, Mountain, Forest, Meadow, and more. Add layers of detailed depth to any scenery or scenario with asset sets that mesh seamlessly with each other. Unlock everything you need from the ground up with these elite environmental tools from NatureManufacture, and help support the Starlight Children's Foundation with your purchase!

items.title: The Complete Inkle Library
items.long_description:
Dive into worlds unknown and challenges unconquered with this bundle of interactive narrative puzzle games from Inkle! Search through an archive of lost books hidden inside an old computer to solve the secrets of TR-49! Decipher the language of an ancient civilization hidden inside a nebula in Heaven’s Vault! Climb, jump, run, and sing your way through the rainy Scottish highlands in A Highland Song! Take on Jules Verne’s legendary trip around the world in the award-winning globetrotting game 80 Days! There are even more Inkle classics to be found in this exciting bundle, so get it now at the price of your choice and help support Breakthrough T1D with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before January 1st, 2027.

items.title: Creature and Character Creation Bundle
items.long_description:

Pay what you want for hundreds of specialized asset packs that work seamlessly with your preferred creation platforms, such as VDM Blender and ZBrush, including Faceit: Facial Expressions and Performance Capture and Base Mesh Mega Pack 3D Models - Human, Anime & Cartoon Animals. Plus, your purchase includes 44 ears, 44 teeth, 44 noses, and much, much more. Create amazing monsters before it’s too late, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before October 31, 2026.

The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Play “Yuri Cupid” in Kindred Spirits on the Roof, a slice-of-life tale of love, loss, lust, and friendship. Lead a romantic cat-and-mouse game with a supernatural spin across a gorgeous watercolor-style backdrop in OshiRabu: Waifus Over Husbandos. Or lose yourself in SeaBed, a deep psychological mystery visual novel told through the perspectives of three unique characters. Plus, your purchase helps support our friends at Dames 4 Games.

Get up to speed quickly with lessons like Intermediate Design Patterns in C# with Unity 6 and Create a 2D Platformer in Unity: Build a Side-Scrolling Game from Scratch before it’s too late! Realize your artistic vision in 3D or 2D and help support Alzheimer's Research UK!

Save countless hours of production with a library built for developers, artists, and studios who want AAA-quality content without the AAA production time, and help support the Forest School Foundation with your purchase!

Save countless hours of production with a library built for developers, artists, and studios who want AAA-quality content without the AAA production time.

Build Bigger 🚀

Journey into Williams’ beloved fantasy world of Osten Ard with the The Witchwood Crown. Unlock 20+ amazing eBooks all for a price you choose, and help support the ACLU with your purchase!

items.title: The Best of Robert Silverberg by Open Road Media
items.long_description: Feel like you’ve read all the new sci-fi and fantasy books and looking for something a little more classic? We’ve got a bundle full of the best novels and stories by celebrated author Robert Silverberg! Dive into his Majipoor Cycle with Lord Valentine’s Castle, following an amnesiac juggler who finds out he’s the heir to an entire planet, or start with the prequel trilogy launched by Sorcerers of Majipoor, and learn how the throne became so contested in the first place. Meet the new inheritors of the Earth in At Winter’s End, a tribe of humanoids who emerge from their hibernation after an apocalypse. Or keep things short and sweet with the novella Nightwings, set on an unfamiliar Earth facing alien invasion. There are many more worlds, futures, and adventures to explore in this ebook bundle of Silverberg’s work, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support the ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!

items.title: All-In-One 2D Game Dev Level Creation Pack
items.long_description:
Build entire game worlds faster with this massive Level Creation Bundle from GameDev Market. Designed to streamline your workflow, this collection gives you everything you need to create levels across multiple styles - from top-down and platformer to isometric environments and beyond. Jump straight into development with ready-to-use tilesets like Wolfsong Tilesets, Pixel Art Tileset Collection, Cartoon Platformer Tileset Pack, and more, all built to help you quickly design, iterate, and expand your worlds without starting from scratch. Stop piecing levels together asset-by-asset—get a complete toolkit to bring your ideas to life, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027. The coupon expires on August 31st, 2026.

The license agreement can be found here.

items.title: The Ultimate GenAI & LLM Developer Bundle
items.long_description: Learn how to create your own LLMs and GenAI that understand, generate, and process at lightning speed with an all-new Humble Video Learning Bundle. Jump-start your career with this 15+ course library, highlighted by The Complete LangChain & LLMs Guide and AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide, you’ll gain the knowledge and confidence you need to succeed in these challenging and in-demand fields. Pay what you want for the ultimate GenAI and LLM bundle, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

items.title: Spring Into Creativity
items.long_description: Unlock four elite editing software programs for one low price with the all-new Spring Into Creativity Bundle. Make every shot your best with the advanced photo editing tools in PaintShop Pro 2023. Save hours of time spent editing at your computer with the efficient AI-based solutions of AfterShot Pro 2023. Turn your best moments into unique movies with the easy-to-use editing software VideoStudio Pro. Create your own AI talking photos with PhotoMirage. Pay what you want for a comprehensive creative library and help support Extra Life with your purchase.
